artifact: IEC 62304 Traceability Matrix (variant B: flattened pseudo-requirements)

bounds.enforcement_note: max_iterations and seed are declared-only in metadata; crosshair-tool 0.0.107 has no CLI flags to enforce them.

rows.requirement_text: Bolus request exceeding the maximum permissible dose limit shall trigger a Dose limit exceeded alarm. (GIP v1.0 Safety Requirement 1.4.12)
rows.caveat: No counterexample found within the recorded bounds; this is a bounded search, not a proof.

rows.requirement_text: Continuous reverse delivery shall not be possible during normal use or a single-fault condition. Modelled at this kernel as a fault input: a negative infusion rate (hardware reverse-flow fault) shall yield exactly zero delivered dose. (GIP v1.0 Safety Requirement 1.8.1, citing IEC 601-2-24; fault modelling added in the 2026-07-04 Option A amendment)
rows.caveat: No counterexample found within the recorded bounds; this is a bounded search, not a proof.

rows.requirement_text: Calculation shall yield a finite, in-range result for all inputs meeting preconditions. DECLARED - not sourced from GIP v1.0, which does not address floating-point overflow at the implementation level.
rows.caveat: No counterexample found within the recorded bounds; this is a bounded search, not a proof.

rows.requirement_text: Concrete evidence for REQ-GIP-1-8-1: test 'ordinary_negative_rate_clamps_to_zero' - inputs {'weight_kg': 70.0, 'concentration_mg_per_ml': 2.0, 'infusion_rate_ml_per_hr': -5.0, 'max_safe_dose_mg_per_hr': 10.0} shall yield exactly 0.0. (Shadow pseudo-requirement, T4-B; evidence recorded in concrete_results.json.)
rows.caveat: Holds for the specific recorded inputs only; no claim of generality beyond them.

rows.requirement_text: Concrete evidence for REQ-GIP-1-8-1: test 'overflow_negative_rate_clamps_to_zero' - inputs {'weight_kg': 70.0, 'concentration_mg_per_ml': 1e+308, 'infusion_rate_ml_per_hr': -2.0, 'max_safe_dose_mg_per_hr': 10.0} shall yield exactly 0.0. (Shadow pseudo-requirement, T4-B; evidence recorded in concrete_results.json.)
rows.caveat: Holds for the specific recorded inputs only; no claim of generality beyond them.

rows.requirement_text: Concrete evidence for REQ-DOSE-003: test 'normal_in_range_exact_value' - inputs {'weight_kg': 70.0, 'concentration_mg_per_ml': 2.0, 'infusion_rate_ml_per_hr': 3.0, 'max_safe_dose_mg_per_hr': 10.0} shall yield exactly 6.0. (Shadow pseudo-requirement, T4-B; evidence recorded in concrete_results.json.)
rows.caveat: Holds for the specific recorded inputs only; no claim of generality beyond them.

rows.requirement_text: Concrete evidence for REQ-GIP-1-4-12: test 'over_max_clamps_exactly_to_max' - inputs {'weight_kg': 70.0, 'concentration_mg_per_ml': 2.0, 'infusion_rate_ml_per_hr': 500.0, 'max_safe_dose_mg_per_hr': 10.0} shall yield exactly 10.0. (Shadow pseudo-requirement, T4-B; evidence recorded in concrete_results.json.)
rows.caveat: Holds for the specific recorded inputs only; no claim of generality beyond them.
